data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protects servers from Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes proprietary anti-DDoS technology and high-bandwidth capacity.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures communication security by encrypting data between client and server.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: Analyzes traffic patterns to identify and mitigate potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms for anomaly detection.

data.title: Secure Authentication
data.description: Protects user accounts with multi-factor authentication processes.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0 and FIDO2 standards for secure login.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regularly reviews and patches system vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated scanning tools and security audits.
